content.text: {"component":"tagging","summary":"Tagging reads as a governed, reusable tagging-and-classification runtime with strong audits, docs, and test/tooling; it looks pre-RC with minor release-governance gaps to close.","strengths":["Clear canonical tagging product identity and HTTP contract surface","Runnable host-minimal runtime with Docker and DB flows","Rich governance/audit scripts and security/RBAC/observability configs","Multi-band test/tooling (PHPUnit, PHPStan, Panther, Playwright) with GitHub Actions present","Comprehensive docs, demos, and fixtures"],"risks":["No git release tags reduce release traceability","Requires PHP ^8.4 which may constrain some environments","Dist-only static analysis/test configs risk drift (phpstan.neon.dist, phpunit.xml.dist)","E2E (Playwright/Panther) presence not clearly wired into CI"],"next_actions":["Publish annotated release tags and add a release workflow in GitHub Actions","Wire composer audit:ci, OpenAPI publish, and E2E suites (Panther/Playwright) into CI","Pin PHP 8.4+ in Docker/runtime docs and images to match composer constraints","Promote phpstan.neon and phpunit.xml from *.dist with agreed levels and enforce in CI","Clarify public consumption examples and API usage in docs"],"notes":["Assessment grounded in repository facts at master@c759d978fc3520eaa81cb70a68a129371b5df1ee; no external scans executed.","Adoc report excerpt used as internal context alongside repo files and scripts."],"confidence":"medium","evidence_paths":["composer.json","README.md","docker-compose.yml","host-minimal/index.php","host/Dockerfile","contracts/http/","config/tag_route_catalog.php","config/tag_observability.yaml","config/tag_security.yaml","config/tag_rbac.yaml","config/tag_quota.yaml",".github/workflows/","phpstan.neon.dist","phpunit.xml.dist",".githooks/pre-commit","package.json","docs/antora.yml","docs/ops/","docs/tag/",".antora-src/modules/ROOT/pages/component/tagging/report/index.adoc"],"suggested_score_overrides":{"product":null,"architecture":null,"runtime":null,"qa":null,"ops":8.8,"market":null,"overall":null},"metric_updates":{"product":{"summary":"Product identity is clearly expressed as a canonical tagging-and-classification component with a stable HTTP surface and rich docs/fixtures.","risks":["Proprietary licensing and internal posture may limit external adoption paths"],"improvements":["Expand public usage examples and API walkthroughs in docs to guide consumers"],"evidence":["composer.json","contracts/http/","docs/tag/","README.md"]},"architecture":{"summary":"Architecture presents a coherent, Symfony-aligned component with explicit contracts, host-minimal runtime, and governed configs/boundaries.","risks":["Broad surface (CRUD, assign, search/suggest, discovery) increases complexity and boundary drift risk"],"improvements":["Keep core-boundary audits enforced in CI and document bounded-context edges in docs"],"evidence":["host-minimal/","contracts/http/","config/tag_policy.yaml","config/tag_route_catalog.php","composer.json"]},"runtime":{"summary":"Runnable surface is present via host-minimal, Docker Compose, DB migration/seed scripts, and route/catalog configs.","risks":["Runtime requires PHP ^8.4 per composer.json, which may gate some environments"],"improvements":["Pin PHP version in Dockerfiles/docs and keep smoke/DB scripts exercised in CI"],"evidence":["docker-compose.yml","host/Dockerfile","host-minimal/smoke-health.php","config/tag_route_catalog.php","composer.json"]},"qa":{"summary":"Quality toolchain spans PHPUnit, PHPStan, Panther, and Playwright with fixtures validation, pre-commit hooks, and CI workflows present.","risks":["E2E suites (Panther/Playwright) are declared but not visibly enforced in CI","Dist-only configs (phpstan.neon.dist, phpunit.xml.dist) can drift from enforced settings"],"improvements":["Add CI jobs for Playwright and Panther; promote and lock phpstan/phpunit configs in CI"],"evidence":["composer.json","phpstan.neon.dist","phpunit.xml.dist",".githooks/pre-commit",".github/workflows/","package.json"]},"ops":{"summary":"Operational governance is strong (security/RBAC/observability configs, deploy artifacts, audit scripts, and ops docs), with a minor release-governance gap.","risks":["Absence of git release tags reduces traceability of releases and artifacts"],"improvements":["Publish annotated tags and a release workflow; run audit:ci and OpenAPI publish in CI"],"evidence":["config/tag_security.yaml","config/tag_rbac.yaml","config/tag_observability.yaml","deploy/docker/","docs/ops/","composer.json",".github/workflows/"]},"market":{"summary":"Positioning aligns with enterprise tagging/classification runtime more than a simple tags helper, with portfolio-friendly docs and fixtures.","risks":["Internal, proprietary posture and platform focus may limit external market-facing narrative"],"improvements":["Clarify ecosystem fit and external consumption stories (SDK/API examples, SLAs) in docs"],"evidence":[".antora-src/modules/ROOT/pages/component/tagging/report/index.adoc","docs/tag/","README.md"]},"overall":{"summary":"Component reads as a strong pre-RC subsystem with governed runtime, audits, and tests; close minor release-governance and CI wiring gaps to reach RC.","risks":["Release traceability (tags) and CI coverage for E2E remain partially unverified"],"improvements":["Add release tagging workflow and enforce E2E/audit steps in CI to harden RC posture"],"evidence":[".github/workflows/","docs/rc5","composer.json"]}}}
